reviewsSample.text: I bought more than one pair of eyeglasses from them. According to what I heard, at first the lenses caused dizziness, but after one day of use the dizziness went away. However, I couldn't see clearly with more than one pair of glasses. I went and returned the glasses to another shop in a different area, and they told me that the prescription was all wrong. I went and returned them again, and at first they told me the prescription was correct and there was nothing wrong with it. I told them to put it on an electronic lens measuring device, and it turned out that 5 out of 7 eyeglasses had an incorrect axial prescription and they were replaced. When they were replaced, there was a difference in the color of the lenses in the light. After asking at another eyeglasses shop, I confirmed that they were replacing the lenses with a different type and of lower quality, and there was even a difference in the color in the light reflections. There was also a defect in the cutting and fitting of some of the lenses.
Zero trust and no lies, based on experience
A landmark of the Turkmen Rashidiya neighborhood
He who leaves without a reason cannot be trusted, even if he comes back!
I don't know anything about him.
I have never visited this place and I don't know it.

Here are details of each category of housewares I mentioned:

1. Preparation Tools

Used to prepare food before cooking, these include:

Kitchen knives (for slicing, chopping, and fine dicing).

Cutting boards (wooden, plastic, and glass).

Graters (for onions, cheese, and vegetables).

Citrus juicers (manual and electric).

Stirring spoons (wooden and silicone).

Egg beaters (manual and electric).

Food strainers (for washing and draining).

Food scales (for accurately measuring ingredients).

Egg and vegetable slicers (for quickly slicing food).

Silicone brushes (for spreading butter or sauces).

2. Serving Utensils

Used to present food and drinks elegantly, these include:

Serving plates (in various sizes and shapes).

Serving trays (glass, wood, and plastic).

Serving spoons, forks, and knives (for food and desserts).

Cups and glasses (for water, juices, coffee, and tea).

Serving pitchers (for tea, coffee, and juices).

Plates and cake stands (for serving desserts).

Large serving spoons (for salads and large dishes).

Tablecloths and tablecloths (for decorating and protecting the table).

3. Cleaning Tools

These help maintain a clean home and include:

Brooms and mops (manual and electric).

Steam mops (for deep cleaning).

Sponges and cleaning brushes (for dishes and surfaces).

Multi-purpose cleaners (for floors, glass, and furniture).

Garbage bags (in various sizes).

Cleaning gloves (for protection from chemicals).

Wet cleaning wipes (for quick cleaning).

Corner cleaning brushes (for hard-to-reach areas).

4. Storage and Organization Tools

These help organize the home and save space and include:

Storage boxes (plastic, wooden, and fabric).

Drawer organizers (for kitchen, bathroom, and clothes).

Clothes hangers (wooden, metal, and plastic).

Storage shelves (for kitchen, bathroom, and bedrooms).

Storage baskets (for fruits, vegetables, toys, and books).

Food containers (for keeping food dry or refrigerated).

Door hooks (for organizing shoes or towels).

Soap and tissue dispensers (for kitchen and bathroom).

reviewsSample.text: I bought a laptop from them through their website and frankly what they did and advised me even on things I knew, a high-end Company and nice staff

Honestly, my experience with Al-Nabaa Company was exceptional. They provide advice before you buy, their products are genuine, they come with a warranty on everything, and their prices are very reasonable. Most importantly, their customer service is excellent.

A leading and outstanding company in every aspect of electronics and computers, they are exceptionally courteous and professional in their business dealings. Their customer service is top-notch, their prices are competitive, and they guarantee excellent quality and after-sales support. I hope all companies in all fields will adopt Al-Nabaa Company's approach. A heartfelt thank you to the Al-Nabaa Company team.
Honestly, the place is very classy, ​​and the service is even better. The best thing is that most of the top and leading brands have their latest releases available at official prices.

A respectable and outstanding company with a wonderful and capable staff in several fields and reasonable prices.............and many more advantages. I wish other companies would compete with it in excellence.

reviewsSample.text: I arrived at 6 and you were closed, and it was time to close at 8.

The service is poor; the university branch doesn't provide the required level of service. They can't issue a SIM card, claiming it's an employee SIM card that's been sitting idle for a long time.

And it's a private company, yet they also take a holiday. I'm not against holidays, and I know employees have the right to take time off, but since it's a company providing a service, that service should be available all day, and its branches should never close during the day.

🇸🇦AR _ 🇬🇧EN _ 🇹🇷TR
Al-Hafez Company is one of the solid and well-known companies in the city. The lack of international retail agencies such as MediaMarket and the ease with which counterfeit electronic goods enter the country have made Al-Hafez Company a preferred choice for those seeking original products with a real guarantee. The price is 5% more expensive than other brands.
